title: Pennsylvania Disability Examiners Division — Constitution & By-Laws
description: Constitution and by-laws of the Pennsylvania Disability Examiners Division, a chapter of NADE that is also a division of the Pennsylvania Rehabilitation Association (itself a chapter of the National Rehabilitation Association). Articles cover the dual chapter-division identity and purpose, membership across the three parent organizations, a January 1 to December 31 membership/fiscal year, membership meetings (25% quorum, no proxy voting), officers (President, Vice-President, Secretary, Treasurer), standing committees (Membership, Professional Standards, Nominating, Program, By-Laws), election of officers, and the by-laws amendment method.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Pennsylvania Disability Examiners Division Chapter
source.title: Pennsylvania Disability Examiners Division Constitution & By-Laws

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document Pennsylvania-Const-Bylaws.docx. No adoption/revision date is stated in the text, so temporal_coverage is omitted. Inline original page markers ('-2-', '-3-', '-4-') survive the conversion. Distinctive feature: the chapter is jointly a NADE chapter and a division of the Pennsylvania Rehabilitation Association. Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
